This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes
  assert_equals: circle(at left bottom) expected "circle(at left bottom)" but got "circle(at 0% 100%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 1
  assert_equals: circle(at bottom left) expected "circle(at left bottom)" but got "circle(at 0% 100%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 2
  assert_equals: circle(at right calc(10% + 5px)) expected "circle(at right calc(10% + 5px))" but got "circle(at 100% calc(10% + 5px))"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 3
  assert_equals: ellipse(at left bottom) expected "ellipse(at left bottom)" but got "ellipse(at 0% 100%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 4
  assert_equals: ellipse(at bottom left) expected "ellipse(at left bottom)" but got "ellipse(at 0% 100%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 5
  assert_equals: ellipse(at right calc(10% + 5px)) expected "ellipse(at right calc(10% + 5px))" but got "ellipse(at 100% calc(10% + 5px))"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 14
  assert_equals: circle(closest-side at center) expected "circle(at center center)" but got "circle(at 50% 50%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 15
  assert_equals: ellipse(closest-side closest-side at center) expected "ellipse(at center center)" but got "ellipse(at 50% 50%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 16
  assert_equals: circle(farthest-side at center) expected "circle(farthest-side at center center)" but got "circle(farthest-side at 50% 50%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 17
  assert_equals: circle(10px at center) expected "circle(10px at center center)" but got "circle(10px at 50% 50%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 18
  assert_equals: ellipse(farthest-side 10px at center) expected "ellipse(farthest-side 10px at center center)" but got "ellipse(farthest-side 10px at 50% 50%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 23
  assert_equals: circle(at right 5% top 0px) expected "circle(at right 5% top 0px)" but got "circle(at 95% 0%)"
[FAIL] Serialization of basic shapes 24
  assert_equals: ellipse(at right 5% top 0px) expected "ellipse(at right 5% top 0px)" but got "ellipse(at 95% 0%)"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
